title: Invites & Quotas
description: Manage personal/group invite codes, quota grants, and current quota summaries.
loadFailed: Failed to load invite and quota data
groupSummaryFailed: Failed to load group quota summary
summaryDescription: The top cards show the current user's invite quota and the selected group's quota.
grantsDescription: Records every quota grant made to users or groups.
codesDescription: Shows visible invite codes, their source, and their status.
registrationGroupDescription: New users created with this invite will be added to this group. If the group is gone later, they fall back to the root group.
codeDialogDescription: Creating a code consumes quota immediately. Every invite must bind a registration group, and deleted target groups fall back to the root group.
permanentAdminOnly: Only administrators can create permanent invites.
grantDialogDescription: Grant your invite quota to an individual user or a whole group.
